'''hakuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chacmool|chacmool]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chacmool|chacmool]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hakuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækithith|hækithith]] || [[word:hækithij|hækithij]] || [[word:hækithish|hækithish]] || [[word:hækithi|hækithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakukuthuth|hakukuthuth]] || [[word:hakukuthuj|hakukuthuj]] || [[word:hakukuthush|hakukuthush]] || [[word:hakukuthu|hakukuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakuthuth|hakuthuth]] || [[word:hakuthuj|hakuthuj]] || [[word:hakuthush|hakuthush]] || [[word:hakuthu|hakuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakufthuth|hakufthuth]] || [[word:hakufthuj|hakufthuj]] || [[word:hakufthush|hakufthush]] || [[word:hakufthuf|hakufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakuthuthu|hakuthuthu]] || [[word:hakuthuju|hakuthuju]] || [[word:hakuthushu|hakuthushu]] || [[word:hakuthuku|hakuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakuthuth|hakuthuth]] || [[word:hakuthuj|hakuthuj]] || [[word:hakuthush|hakuthush]] || [[word:hakuthu|hakuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakuthuthul|hakuthuthul]] || [[word:hakuthujul|hakuthujul]] || [[word:hakuthushul|hakuthushul]] || [[word:hakuthukul|hakuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakuthuthuthu|hakuthuthuthu]] || [[word:hakuthujuju|hakuthujuju]] || [[word:hakuthushushu|hakuthushushu]] || [[word:hakuthuku|hakuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakuthuthun|hakuthuthun]] || [[word:hakuthujun|hakuthujun]] || [[word:hakuthushun|hakuthushun]] || [[word:hakuthukun|hakuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakuthuthuoro|hakuthuthuoro]] || [[word:hakuthujuoro|hakuthujuoro]] || [[word:hakuthushuoro|hakuthushuoro]] || [[word:hakuthukuoro|hakuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
